description: The second volume of the Deadly Sins of Evil — the gluttony-aligned tale of Banica Conchita, the Beelzenian noblewoman whose appetite consumed her household, her servants, and finally herself. Framed as a multi-course meal at the 'Graveyard' restaurant: each chapter's narrator-host pairs a dish with another step of Banica's descent — from the Tasan pig liver pâté of her childhood to the combo platter that closes her final banquet — narrated alongside the demon dwelling in the wineglass she has come to call master.
